shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch standing in front of a large virtual pin board covered in colorful organized image cards on cream background.
assets.caption: Hatch standing in front of a large virtual pin board covered in colorful organized image cards on cream background.
assets.prompt: Pinterest's Visual Discovery | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of a large virtual pin board covered in colorful image cards organized into categories. Cap tilted, arms slightly raised showing the board. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch in coaching stance comparing social graph organization versus intent-based board organization.
assets.caption: Hatch in coaching stance comparing social graph organization versus intent-based board organization.
assets.prompt: Pinterest's Visual Discovery | lesson-frame: Hatch in coaching pose — calm, standing with arms slightly open. Behind Hatch, two columns: left column shows social graph connections (circles and lines representing people); right column shows a board with intent categories (organized image tiles). The visual metaphor is two different ways of organizing information. Cream background. Watermark: HackProduct wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
